concept_caption: Very high soil organic carbon in topsoil (>21.2 g/kg)
Very low soil organic carbon in topsoil (<8 g/kg)
Very low total nitrogen in topsoil (<0.9 g/kg)
Very high available phosphorus in topsoil (>29 ppm)
Very low available phosphorus in topsoil (<8 ppm)
Very high soil pH in topsoil (>6.5, alkaline conditions)
Very low soil pH in topsoil (<5.5, strongly acidic)
Very high bulk density in topsoil (>1.4 g/cm³, compacted soil)
Very high mean annual precipitation (>1681 mm)
Very low mean annual precipitation (<1094 mm)
Very high long rains precipitation (Mar-May >581 mm)
Very low long rains precipitation (Mar-May <283 mm)
Very low short rains precipitation (Sep-Nov <244 mm)
Very high climatic moisture deficit (>780 mm, severe drought stress)
Very low climatic moisture deficit (<420 mm, low drought stress)
Very high June-August maximum temperature (>29°C, heat stress)
Very low mean annual temperature (<16°C, cool highland climate)
Very high elevation (>2030 m, highland farming zone)
Very low elevation (<945 m, lowland farming zone)
Very high topographic diversity (complex terrain landscape)
Very high tree canopy cover (30-100%, agroforestry or forest margin)
Very low tree canopy cover (<1%, open cropland)
Very high population density within 10 km (>15 people/km²)
Very short distance to surface water (<1000 m)
Very long distance to paved road (>6000 m, remote location)
Very high crop yield (>6.3 ton/ha)
Very high vegetation greenness during the growing season (NDVI >0.64)
Very low vegetation greenness during the growing season (NDVI <0.43)
Very high vegetation greenness during the long rains (Mar-May NDVI >0.65)
Very low vegetation greenness during the long rains (Mar-May NDVI <0.46)
Very high vegetation greenness during the short rains (Sep-Nov NDVI >0.65)
Very low vegetation greenness during the short rains (Sep-Nov NDVI <0.36)
Very high long rains green-up contrast (NDVI MAM minus JJA >0.15, strongly seasonal vegetation responding to Mar-May rains)
Very low long rains green-up contrast (NDVI MAM minus JJA <-0.10, evergreen or non-seasonal vegetation)
Very high short rains green-up contrast (NDVI SON minus DJF >0.11, vegetation strongly responding to Sep-Nov rains)
Very low short rains green-up contrast (NDVI SON minus DJF <-0.16, minimal green-up during short rains season)
Very high dry season NDVI (Dec-Feb >0.63, evergreen or perennial vegetation)
Very low dry season NDVI (Dec-Feb <0.45, strongly deciduous or bare during dry season)
Very high total precipitation in the growing season (AGERA5 >1785 mm)
Very low total precipitation in the growing season (AGERA5 <733 mm)
Very high long rains precipitation (AGERA5 Mar-May >861 mm)
Very low long rains precipitation (AGERA5 Mar-May <404 mm)
Very high growing season maximum temperature (AGERA5 >27.0°C, heat stress)
Very low growing season maximum temperature (AGERA5 <23.7°C)
Very high growing degree days base 10°C (AGERA5 >2743)
Very low growing degree days base 10°C (AGERA5 <2023)
Very high number of wet days in the growing season (AGERA5 >201 days)
Very low number of wet days in the growing season (AGERA5 <105 days)
